zh.Rainham, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭肯特萊音哈姆
zh.St Margaret's Church, Rainham, Kent, Eng: 英國肯特萊音哈姆聖 馬加也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Donnet於大約1355年出生在英國肯特萊音哈姆。她和John Donnet至少有1個兒子。她去世於1385年之前在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國肯特萊音哈姆聖 馬加也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Donnet于大约1355年出生在英国肯特萊音哈姆。她和John Donnet至少有1个儿子。她去世于1385年之前在她的家乡，埋葬在英国肯特萊音哈姆聖 馬加也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Donnet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dunnett
meanings: Scottish: variant of Dunnet, a habitational name from Dunnet in Caithness.

English: from the Old French personal name Donet, Donat, from Latin Donatus (see Donat ). Donatus was the name of several Christian saints and was popular in France and Italy, whence it may have been brought to England.
English: habitational name from Downhead in Somerset or Donhead in Wiltshire, both named from Old English dūn ‘hill, down’ + Old English hēafod ‘head, end’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Donnet was born about 1355, in Rainham, Kent, England. She had at least 1 son with John Donnet. She died before 1385, in her hometown, and was buried in St Margaret's Church, Rainham, Kent, England.

ja.Rainham, Kent, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスケントレインハム
ja.St Margaret's Church, Rainham, Kent, Eng: イギリスケントレインハムスト マルガーエト'ス チャーチ
ja.Rainham, Kent, England: イギリスケントレインハム
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Donnetは約1355年にイギリスケントレインハムで生まれた。彼女はJohn Donnetとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1385年以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスケントレインハムスト マルガーエト'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Margaret's Church, Rainham, Kent, Eng: 영국 켄트 레이함 스트 마가트'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Donnet(은)는 대략 1355년 영국 켄트 레이함에서 태어났다. 그녀는 John Donnet(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 켄트 레이함 스트 마가트'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.St Margaret's Church, Rainham, Kent, Eng: ст маргарет'с чурч, реинам, кэнт, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. John Donnet родилась около 1355 г. в местности реинам, кэнт, Англия. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от John Donnet. Она умерла перед 1385 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности ст маргарет'с чурч, реинам, кэнт, Англия.
